response:
Emily started with 25 dogs at her rescue center located at [center_name] before receiving new arrivals on [arrival_day]. She welcomed 4 puppies from [town_name] and one stray dog found by [family_name], bringing her total count up significantly. These new additions were cared for in the [care_facility] while waiting for their forever homes.

On Saturday, 2 families adopted 3 dogs each, meaning 6 dogs left the [adoption_center] permanently. After these adoptions, Emily currently has 26 dogs remaining in her care at [current_location]. She is now preparing to welcome more animals from [future_source] to continue her vital work.
